◎简　　介  

　　Here we have Mr. Dallesandro as an amoral punk who, with the aid of his like-minded cronies, terrorizes innocent city dwellers. Mr. Balsam plays the cop who learns of the punks' reign of terror and sets out to stop it. This movie owes more than a little to A CLOCKWORK ORANGE, as did so many other Italian films of the 70s. It doesn't resemble Kubrick's film structurally or aesth...
